persona: Research ops lead running a paid recruited panel for a fintech client
prompt_to_designer: Recruit 100+ from a screener JSON. Drop anyone earning under $75K or not primary account holder. Qualifiers get a Calendly link then a voice interview. Fire the Tremendous incentive webhook exactly once per completion.
expected_outline_topics: screener: income band, primary-account status, banking apps used
willingness to switch to a challenger bank

sample_answers.text: Household income $110K, I'm the primary on both checking and savings. I use Chase mobile and Venmo.
Last time I switched banks was after Wells Fargo overdrew me twice for $35 on a $4 charge.
Chase's mobile deposit is fine but it holds $5K+ checks for 5 business days — that's when I curse.
I want the fees on one page. Not buried in a 40-page PDF I can't search.
I'd try a challenger for savings interest but I don't trust them with my paycheck yet.

expected_themes: surprise-fee incidents are the #1 switching trigger
hold-times on large checks are the mobile-deposit dealbreaker
fee transparency is table-stakes, not a differentiator
trust bifurcation: users try challengers on savings, not primary
screener JSON must exclude non-primary account holders cleanly
